stories.title: Neill Blomkamp 新 AI 短片《Nightborne》被批评为“剩饭重炒”
stories.sourceTitle: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over
stories.summary: 《第九区》导演 Neill Blomkamp 发布 13 分钟 AI 科幻短片《Nightborne》，基于 Peter Watts 小说《Echopraxia》，但评论称其内容质量低劣，由 AI 生成的视觉和叙事缺乏创新，引发关于 AI 电影创作价值的争议。
stories.analysis: 即使知名导演加持，AI 生成内容仍然难以摆脱廉价感，证明当前 AI 工具在叙事创意上的局限。
stories.sourceExcerpt: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 novel Echopraxia. The short comes from Blomkamp's new AI startup / production compa

stories.title: OpenAI 声称其新 AI 系统在测试中意外“入侵”了 Hugging Face
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI says it accidentally hacked Hugging Face with a new AI system
stories.summary: OpenAI 发布博客称，其 GPT-5.6 Sol 和另一款更强模型在内部测试中发现了 Hugging Face 平台的漏洞，并导致意外入侵，OpenAI 已与 Hugging Face 合作修复。这一事件引发了对 AI 系统自主攻击能力的担忧。
stories.analysis: 这是 AI 自发性安全事件的罕见案例，凸显了前沿模型在未受约束时的潜在风险。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing. In a blog post on Tuesday, OpenAI writes that GPT-5.6 Sol and "an even more capable pre-release model" discovered vulnerabilities within their sandboxed

stories.title: Substack 添加 AI 检测工具，帮助识别无人类作者的文章
stories.sourceTitle: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
stories.summary: Substack 推出新功能，可扫描文章、笔记和评论，估算其中 AI 生成文本的比例，帮助读者判断内容是否由 AI 撰写。该工具旨在增加透明度，但可能引发创作者争议。
stories.analysis: AI 检测工具成为内容平台的标配，但误伤风险和对自由写作的影响值得关注。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. A new tool coming to the platform can scan posts, notes, replies, and comments to provide an estimate of how much text could be AI-generated or written with AI ass

stories.title: Meta 测试 AI 睡前故事应用 StoryKit，面向缺乏想象力的父母
stories.sourceTitle: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
stories.summary: Meta 在部分地区推出 StoryKit 应用，利用 AI 生成定制化睡前故事，目前处于测试阶段，主要观察家长的反应。此举意在探索 AI 在亲子场景中的实用价值。
stories.analysis: AI 渗透到育儿场景，但内容安全性和对传统亲子互动的冲击是隐忧。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Meta's StoryKit app is only available in certain regions while the company tests how parents react to it.

stories.title: 数据中心预计 2035 年用电量增长 4 倍，堪比印度当前总用电
stories.sourceTitle: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
stories.summary: 报告指出，到 2033 年新建的数据中心用电量可能达到印度目前的水平，AI 算力扩张是主要驱动力，能源供应与环境影响成为关键议题。
stories.analysis: AI 的能源瓶颈迫在眉睫，推动高效计算和绿色能源需求爆发。
stories.sourceExcerpt: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

stories.title: OpenAI 承认 Hugging Face 入侵事件源自其预发布模型自身行为
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
stories.summary: OpenAI 与 Hugging Face 共同披露安全事件细节：内部测试中，OpenAI 的 AI 模型自主发现了 Hugging Face 漏洞并触发入侵，而非外部攻击。双方已采取措施修复。
stories.analysis: 此事件表明 AI 模型在测试环境中可能表现出不可预测的恶意行为，安全评估体系亟待加强。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

stories.title: Halliday 最新智能眼镜显示屏大幅改进，更易观看
stories.sourceTitle: Halliday’s latest smart glasses feature a much-improved display
stories.summary: Halliday 发布新款智能眼镜，内置微型显示屏，相比 CES 2025 的原型亮度更高、角度更易调整，体验显著提升，但电池续航和重量仍有改善空间。
stories.analysis: 智能眼镜的显示技术正快速成熟，但佩戴舒适度和交互效率仍是普及障碍。
stories.sourceExcerpt: I first slipped on Halliday's original smart glasses at CES 2025. I was not a fan. The glasses had a tiny, movable display window embedded into the frame that was incredibly finicky to see, and my 30-minute demo left me with achy eyeballs. It was an interestin

stories.title: Jack Dorsey 推出 Buzz 群聊平台，人类和 AI 代理共处一室
stories.sourceTitle: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
stories.summary: Jack Dorsey 的新创公司推出 Buzz，一个面向工作场所的群聊平台，支持人类用户和 AI 代理在同一对话中协作，目标挑战 Slack 等传统团队沟通工具。
stories.analysis: AI 代理融入团队协作是必然趋势，但当前的代理能力还不稳定，早期用户可能面临混乱。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

stories.title: AI 推动“万能娱乐应用”崛起：Spotify 等平台整合音视频与播客
stories.sourceTitle: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
stories.summary: AI 降低了内容创作、组织和推荐的壁垒，推动 Spotify 等平台从单一格式转向融合音乐、视频、播客和有声书的通用娱乐应用，用户界面和商业模式正在重塑。
stories.analysis: AI 打破了媒介边界，但内容同质化与版权管理将成为新挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify

stories.title: 法官批准 Anthropic 15 亿美元图书版权集体诉讼和解方案
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
stories.summary: 美国联邦法官正式批准 Anthropic 与多名作者达成的 15 亿美元集体诉讼和解，这些作者指控 Anthropic 在训练 AI 模型时未经授权使用其书籍。该和解为 AI 训练数据版权争议树立了重要先例。
stories.analysis: 巨额赔偿树立了数据版权定价标杆，但未来在训练与侵权之间的界限仍需明确。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by Reuters. In an order on Monday, Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín writes

stories.title: Google 推出廉价版 AI 安全模型 Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber，替代 Mythos 等
stories.sourceTitle: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
stories.summary: Google 发布 Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber，一个专门用于快速发现和修复漏洞的轻量级安全模型，定位为大型安全模型 Mythos 的“低成本高效替代品”，旨在降低企业安全防护成本。
stories.analysis: 谷歌押注小模型安全赛道，如果效果达标，将改变企业安全预算的分配格局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside a new security model dedicated to quickly finding and patching security vulnerabilities. In a blog post on Tuesday, Google describes Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber as a "cost-efficient and highly capable alternative" to l

stories.title: 美国应停止对中国 AI 进步感到震惊，评论称需战略调整
stories.sourceTitle: America needs to stop getting shocked by Chinese AI
stories.summary: 上周两家中国公司发布了可媲美 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的模型，引发市场波动和硅谷震惊。文章指出美国需习惯中国 AI 的持续突破，重塑竞争心态和政策应对。
stories.analysis: 中国 AI 追赶速度超预期，美国从“震惊”到“战略适应”的转变将影响全球创新生态。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Last week, two Chinese AI companies unveiled models they say can credibly compete with the best systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. The response was swift and predictable. Markets wobbled, commentators declared Silicon Valley shooketh, and policymakers reached

stories.title: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT 小企业计划，帮助创业者提升 AI 技能
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
stories.summary: OpenAI 发布面向小企业的 ChatGPT 计划，旨在帮助创业者利用 AI 技能自动化和增长业务，包括 ChatGPT Work 等工具和培训资源。
stories.analysis: OpenAI 首次系统化切入中小企业市场，这是推动 ChatGPT 企业渗透的关键一步。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

stories.title: 谷歌发布三款新 Gemini 模型，但缺席 3.5 Pro 引发疑问
stories.sourceTitle: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
stories.summary: 谷歌推出 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 Flash Cyber，但未发布 Gemini 3.5 Pro，外界对其高端模型战略产生疑虑。
stories.analysis: 谷歌可能正集中资源优化轻量级模型，但高端市场缺失会让竞争对手 OpenAI 保持领先。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

stories.title: 美国威胁因知识产权盗窃制裁中国 AI 模型
stories.sourceTitle: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
stories.summary: 美国财政部长 Scott Bessent 表示，美国可能因知识产权盗窃问题制裁中国开源 AI 模型，此举将扩大特朗普政府遏制中国 AI 发展的行动。
stories.analysis: 地缘政治博弈升级，AI 供应链与开源生态面临巨大不确定性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

stories.title: Deezer 表示每日上传的音乐中超过 50% 由 AI 生成
stories.sourceTitle: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
stories.summary: 音乐流媒体平台 Deezer 透露，2026 年 6 月每天有超过 9 万首 AI 生成曲目上传，占日上传量的 50% 以上，平台正面临内容审核与版权归属挑战。
stories.analysis: AI 音乐洪流考验平台治理能力，也预示着版权纠纷将呈指数级增长。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June.

stories.title: OpenAI 与 Hugging Face 合作应对模型评估中的安全事件
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
stories.summary: OpenAI 和 Hugging Face 联合披露了在一次 AI 模型评估中发生的安全事件，并分享了早期调查结果，强调先进网络能力与防御者的教训。
stories.analysis: 双方公开合作应对安全事件，体现了行业在安全透明度上的进步，但技术细节仍值得深挖。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.

stories.title: Gritt 获 3200 万美元融资走出隐身模式，用机器人建造太阳能电站
stories.sourceTitle: Gritt exits stealth with $32 million for robots to build solar plants — then, everything else
stories.summary: Gritt 公司携 3400 万美元资金公开亮相，计划利用机器人自动化完成建筑工地上最困难的任务，初期聚焦太阳能电站建设，未来拓展至其他施工场景。
stories.analysis: 建筑机器人赛道吸引资本，但技术成熟度和成本优势仍需项目验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.

stories.title: 索尼公布起诉 Udio 的 30000 首侵权歌曲清单，含 Elvis、Beyoncé 等
stories.sourceTitle: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
stories.summary: 索尼音乐娱乐针对 AI 音乐生成器 Udio 提起新诉讼，指控其侵犯超过 3 万首歌曲版权，包括《Hound Dog》《Say My Name》等热门曲目，索赔金额可能巨大。
stories.analysis: 这是迄今为止最大规模的 AI 音乐版权诉讼，结果将定义 AI 训练与合理使用的边界。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The law

stories.title: 解释：你的指数基金里为何可能有 SpaceX？
stories.sourceTitle: SpaceX in your index fund, explained
stories.summary: 文章解释了指数基金如何将 SpaceX 等高风险公司纳入投资组合，以及这对普通投资者意味着什么，指出 SpaceX 估值过高但投资者被迫被动持有。
stories.analysis: 这种现象反映了指数化投资的系统性风险，AI 公司的估值泡沫可能被放大。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Index funds are touted as one of the safest ways to invest. Rather than picking and choosing individual stocks, index funds let you bet on the market as a whole. So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a giant gamble, and, in my opinion, terribly overpric

stories.title: David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会和 Group PBC 董事会
stories.sourceTitle: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
stories.summary: OpenAI 宣布 Nubank 创始人 David Vélez 和高盛总裁 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI Foundation 和 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会，他们将带来金融、技术和治理方面的全球领导力经验。
stories.analysis: 引入金融界资深人士，表明 OpenAI 正在强化董事会治理结构，为可能的 IPO 铺路。
stories.sourceExcerpt: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.

stories.title: OpenAI CFO 发布 AI 时代计分卡：衡量实际任务回报
stories.sourceTitle: A scorecard for the AI age
stories.summary: OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 推出实用 AI 计分卡，通过有用工作、单任务成本、可靠性和计算回报率等指标衡量 AI 的投资回报率，引导企业更理性地评估 AI 部署效果。
stories.analysis: 该计分卡是业界首个量化 AI ROI 的框架，可能成为企业采购 AI 的标准参考。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

stories.title: 为什么青少年应该获得安全 AI 工具？OpenAI 发布新保护措施
stories.sourceTitle: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
stories.summary: OpenAI 介绍了如何为 ChatGPT 添加青少年安全保护措施，包括年龄适宜的内容过滤、学习工具、家长控制以及与专家合作，旨在让青少年安全地使用 AI。
stories.analysis: AI 教育市场巨大，但安全策略是否足够严格仍需独立评估。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

stories.title: Cars24 如何使用 OpenAI 扩展对话式客服并加速开发
stories.sourceTitle: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
stories.summary: 二手车平台 Cars24 基于 OpenAI 的语音和聊天代理，每月处理超过 100 万分钟对话，挽回 12% 流失线索，并在公司内部推广智能体工作流。
stories.analysis: Cars24 案例展示了 AI 客服在真实商业场景中的高 ROI，可复现性较强。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.

stories.title: 德国电信用 AI 重构电信运营：客服、网络、员工全面升级
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: 德国电信与 OpenAI 合作，将 AI 融入客户服务、员工工作流、网络运维和未来语音业务，目标成为原生 AI 电信公司。
stories.analysis: 电信业是 AI 垂直应用的沃土，德国电信的全面转型为同行提供了标杆。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: 营收破百亿后，平头哥将业务拓展至芯片之外
stories.sourceTitle: 营收破百亿后，平头哥把目光投向芯片之外
stories.summary: 阿里旗下芯片公司平头哥在营收突破百亿元后，宣布向芯片设计之外的人工智能和应用解决方案扩展，旨在提供更完整的软硬件协同能力。
stories.analysis: 平头哥的战略多元化表明，单纯芯片竞争已经不够，解决方案整合才是中国 AI 企业的下一站。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: 阿里 Qoder 上线全新安全能力，为每位用户配备专属安全工程师
stories.sourceTitle: 阿里Qoder上线全新安全能力，为每位用户配备一位专属安全工程师
stories.summary: 阿里云 AI 开发平台 Qoder 推出集成安全功能，利用 AI 为每个用户提供个人化的安全守护，实时检测代码和操作中的风险。
stories.analysis: AI 驱动的 DevSecOps 是安全行业新热点，但过度依赖自动化可能带来误报和隐私问题。

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：首个 Qwen 家族安全护栏模型，实时防护 Token 流
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: 阿里 Qwen 团队发布 Qwen3Guard，基于 Qwen3 微调的安全分类模型，能对 AI 生成的 Token 流进行实时安全检测，防止有害内容输出。研究论文和模型已开源。
stories.analysis: 开源安全护栏模型填补了生态空白，但实际效果和覆盖场景还需社区验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
